lines.speaker: Drunken Ali
lines.text: Ahh, a kind stranger. Get this old man another drink so that he may wet his throat and talk to you.

lines.speaker: Jalal the Drunk
lines.text: What were we talking about again? Yes yes, when I was a boy... no, that's not it.

sections.title: When using a beer on Drunken Ali

lines.speaker: Drunken Ali
lines.text: Wha'? Are you lookin' at me? Are you lookin' at me? You know something? You're drunk, you are.

lines.speaker: Drunken Ali
lines.text: Did you hear the one where the camel walks into the bar and orders a pint? The barman asks 'Why the long face!'.

lines.speaker: Drunken Ali
lines.text: Did you hear the one about the man who walked into a bar? He hurt his foot! Hah!

lines.speaker: Drunken Ali
lines.text: I've got a lovely bunch of coconuts! Hehehe...

lines.speaker: Drunken Ali
lines.text: You know, I have this friend, and she... I can't remember. What was I saying?

lines.speaker: Drunken Ali
lines.text: Thank you my friend - now if you don't mind I'm having a conversation with my imaginary friend Ali here.

lines.speaker: Drunken Ali
lines.text: I was a sailor once, you know...

sections.title: When using any other item on Drunken Ali

lines.speaker: Drunken Ali
lines.text: Eh? What's this? I don't want that, get me a beer.
